tree.setup: You meet a guqin player in a temple courtyard at dusk. She hasn't performed publicly in years. The instrument sits on a stone table, untouched. She stares at it while speaking to you.
tree.setup_zh: 黄昏时分，你在一座寺院的庭院里遇到一位古琴演奏者。她已经很多年没有公开演出了。古琴放在石桌上，没有人碰。她一边看着琴一边和你说话。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 我已经三年没有弹给别人听了。不是因为弹不好——恰恰相反，是因为弹得越来越好了。你可能觉得这很矛盾。但当你的琴技到了某个程度，你会发现观众成了一种干扰。他们的期待、他们的鼓掌、他们的评价——这些都在你和音乐之间加了一层东西。没有观众的时候，我和琴之间什么都没有，只有声音。
turns.text_pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng sān nián méiyǒu tán gěi biéren tīng le. Bú shì yīnwèi tán bù hǎo — qiàqiǎ xiāngfǎn, shì yīnwèi tán de yuè lái yuè hǎo le. Nǐ kěnéng juéde zhè hěn máodùn. Dàn dāng nǐ de qín jì dào le mǒu ge chéngdù, nǐ huì fāxiàn guānzhòng chéng le yī zhǒng gānrǎo. Tāmen de qīdài, tāmen de gǔzhǎng, tāmen de píngjià — zhèxiē dōu zài nǐ hé yīnyuè zhī jiān jiā le yī céng dōngxi. Méiyǒu guānzhòng de shíhou, wǒ hé qín zhī jiān shénme dōu méiyǒu, zhǐyǒu shēngyīn.
turns.text_en: I haven't played for anyone in three years. Not because I can't play well — quite the opposite, because I play better and better. You might find that contradictory. But when your skill reaches a certain level, you discover that the audience becomes interference. Their expectations, their applause, their judgments — all add a layer between you and the music. Without an audience, there's nothing between me and the instrument — only sound.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her withdrawal from performing.

options.text_zh: 观众成了干扰——这不是傲慢，是一种对纯粹的追求。当你不再为别人弹，而是为声音本身弹的时候，弹琴的目的就从「被听到」变成了「去听」。你不是在演奏，你是在倾听琴要对你说什么。这是一个根本性的翻转。
options.text_pinyin: Guānzhòng chéng le gānrǎo — zhè bú shì àomàn, shì yī zhǒng duì chúncuì de zhuīqiú. Dāng nǐ bú zài wèi biéren tán, ér shì wèi shēngyīn běnshēn tán de shíhou, tán qín de mùdì jiù cóng 'bèi tīng dào' biàn chéng le 'qù tīng'. Nǐ bú shì zài yǎnzòu, nǐ shì zài qīngtīng qín yào duì nǐ shuō shénme. Zhè shì yī ge gēnběnxìng de fānzhuǎn.
options.text_en: The audience as interference — not arrogance, but a pursuit of purity.
options.feedback: From performing to listening — the musician as servant of the instrument.

options.text_zh: 但是音乐不是应该分享的吗？
options.text_pinyin: Dànshì yīnyuè bú shì yīnggāi fēnxiǎng de ma?
options.text_en: But isn't music meant to be shared?
options.feedback: Challenges her with a common assumption she's already moved beyond.

options.text_en: Where did you used to perform?
options.feedback: Asks about her past career during a philosophical disclosure.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 根本性的翻转——对，就是这个。我年轻的时候参加比赛、开音乐会，所有的练习都是为了「被评判」。每一个音符都在问：「我弹对了吗？他们觉得好吗？」但现在，每一个音符只在问一件事：「这个声音在此刻是真实的吗？」当你不需要任何人的认可时，你会发现你其实不需要弹得「好」——你只需要弹得「真」。
turns.text_pinyin: Gēnběnxìng de fānzhuǎn — duì, jiù shì zhège. Wǒ niánqīng de shíhou cānjiā bǐsài, kāi yīnyuè huì, suǒyǒu de liànxí dōu shì wèile 'bèi pínpàn'. Měi yī ge yīnfú dōu zài wèn: 'wǒ tán duì le ma? Tāmen juéde hǎo ma?' Dàn xiànzài, měi yī ge yīnfú zhǐ zài wèn yī jiàn shì: 'zhège shēngyīn zài cǐ kè shì zhēnshí de ma?' Dāng nǐ bù xūyào rènhé rén de rènkě shí, nǐ huì fāxiàn nǐ qíshí bù xūyào tán de 'hǎo' — nǐ zhǐ xūyào tán de 'zhēn'.
turns.text_en: Fundamental inversion — yes, exactly. When I was young I competed, gave concerts, all practice was for 'being judged.' Every note asked: 'Did I play correctly? Do they think it's good?' But now, every note asks only one thing: 'Is this sound true in this moment?' When you don't need anyone's approval, you discover you don't need to play 'well' — you only need to play 'truly.'

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to the distinction between playing well and playing truly.

options.text_zh: 「好」和「真」的区别——也许是所有艺术的核心问题。「好」是外部标准，需要参照他人；「真」是内部标准，只需参照此刻。技术让你弹得「好」，但只有放弃对「好」的执念才能到达「真」。你这三年的沉默不是退出——是终于找到了弹琴的真正原因。
options.text_pinyin: 'Hǎo' hé 'zhēn' de qūbié — yěxǔ shì suǒyǒu yìshù de héxīn wèntí. 'Hǎo' shì wàibù biāozhǔn, xūyào cānzhào tārén; 'zhēn' shì nèibù biāozhǔn, zhǐ xū cānzhào cǐ kè. Jìshù ràng nǐ tán de 'hǎo', dàn zhǐyǒu fàngqì duì 'hǎo' de zhíniàn cáinéng dàodá 'zhēn'. Nǐ zhè sān nián de chénmò bú shì tuìchū — shì zhōngyú zhǎo dào le tán qín de zhēnzhèng yuányīn.
options.text_en: The difference between 'well' and 'truly' — maybe the core question of all art. 'Well' is external, needing others for reference; 'truly' is internal, needing only this moment. Technique lets you play 'well,' but only by releasing that obsession can you reach 'truly.' Your three years of silence isn't withdrawal — it's finally finding the real reason to play.
options.feedback: Reframes silence as arrival, not departure — the real reason to play was always internal.
A beginner question to a master in philosophical depth.

options.text_zh: 你会不会有一天重新演出？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ huì bú huì yǒu yī tiān chóngxīn yǎnchū?
options.feedback: Looks to the future when the present realization is the point.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 找到了弹琴的真正原因……你知道吗，古人有一个说法叫「对牛弹琴」，大家都觉得是在讽刺听不懂的人。但我现在不这样想了。也许那个弹琴的人从一开始就不需要懂的听众——他只需要一个在场者。牛在场了。风在场了。那就够了。音乐不是一种交流——它是一种存在。它发出声音，不是为了被理解，是为了在这个宇宙里留下一个振动。理解是人的需要，不是声音的需要。
turns.text_pinyin: Zhǎo dào le tán qín de zhēnzhèng yuányīn…… nǐ zhīdào ma, gǔrén yǒu yī ge shuōfǎ jiào 'duì niú tán qín', dàjiā dōu juéde shì zài fěngcì tīng bù dǒng de rén. Dàn wǒ xiànzài bù zhèyàng xiǎng le. Yěxǔ nàge tán qín de rén cóng yī kāishǐ jiù bù xūyào dǒng de tīngzhòng — tā zhǐ xūyào yī ge zàichǎng zhě. Niú zàichǎng le. Fēng zàichǎng le. Nà jiù gòu le. Yīnyuè bú shì yī zhǒng jiāoliú — tā shì yī zhǒng cúnzài. Tā fāchū shēngyīn, bú shì wèile bèi lǐjiě, shì wèile zài zhège yǔzhòu lǐ liú xià yī ge zhèndòng. Lǐjiě shì rén de xūyào, bú shì shēngyīn de xūyào.
turns.text_en: Found the real reason to play... the ancients said 'playing the lute to a cow' — everyone thinks it mocks uncomprehending listeners. But maybe the player never needed a comprehending audience — only a present one. The cow is present. The wind is present. That's enough. Music isn't communication — it's existence. It makes sound not to be understood, but to leave a vibration in this universe.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Respond to her reinterpretation of 'playing the lute to a cow.'

options.text_zh: 理解是人的需要，不是声音的需要——也许艺术的目的只是「发生」。一个声音在空气中出现，不需要被接收，只需要存在。那头牛不需要懂琴，但它的在场让声音有了着陆点。最深的聆听不是理解，只是「在那里」。
options.text_pinyin: Lǐjiě shì rén de xūyào, bú shì shēngyīn de xūyào — yěxǔ yìshù de mùdì zhǐ shì 'fāshēng'. Yī ge shēngyīn zài kōngqì zhōng chūxiàn, bù xūyào bèi jiēshōu, zhǐ xūyào cúnzài. Nà tóu niú bù xūyào dǒng qín, dàn tā de zàichǎng ràng shēngyīn yǒu le zhuólù diǎn. Zuì shēn de língtīng bú shì lǐjiě, zhǐ shì 'zài nàlǐ'.
options.text_en: Understanding is a human need, not sound's need — maybe art's purpose is simply to 'happen.' A sound appearing in the air, needing no reception, only existence. The cow doesn't need to understand the lute, but its presence gives the sound a landing point. The deepest listening isn't understanding — just being there.
options.feedback: Art needs no comprehension, only presence — the cow as the most honest audience.

options.text_zh: 那你现在会弹一首给我听吗？
options.text_pinyin: Nà nǐ xiànzài huì tán yī shǒu gěi wǒ tīng ma?
options.text_en: Would you play something for me now?
options.feedback: Requests a performance from someone who just explained why she doesn't perform.

options.text_zh: 你觉得伯牙和钟子期的故事是什么意思？
options.text_pinyin: Nǐ juéde Bóyá hé Zhōng Zǐqī de gùshi shì shénme yìsi?
options.text_en: What do you think the story of Boya and Zhong Ziqi means?
options.feedback: Brings up another story when she's already reframing the tradition.

tree.cultural_note: The guqin (古琴) is one of the oldest Chinese instruments and has always been associated with solo contemplation rather than public performance. The idiom 对牛弹琴 has traditionally been a mockery of incomprehension, but this musician's reinterpretation — that the cow's presence is enough — aligns with a deeper strand of Chinese aesthetic philosophy: art as self-cultivation rather than communication. The ancient saying 独乐乐 (joy in solitude) captures the same idea.
